text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of Tokai Teio's debut has finally
arrived...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, how much longer? Is my race gonna start
anytime soon?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hmm, maybe? My heart's beating pretty fast.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But it's also because I just wanna hurry up and run
already! ...I think!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Either way, it's not a bad thing. So don't worry
about me!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yep! Here I go! The legend of Teio begins now!
